servers: Since 2015, masternodes & Evonodes are servers anyone can run to secure Dash network and earn rewards.
approx: All numbers on this page are approximate.
hover-any: Hover over any ℹ️ to learn more.
disclaimer: DISCLAIMER : none of the information on this page should be construed as investment advice. Cryptocurrencies are emerging and volatile, and investors should do their own due diligence and research before making any investment decisions.
provided-CoinGecko: Dash price provided in US dollars by CoinGecko
provided-ExchangeRate: Conversion to fiat currencies other than the US dollar using Exchange-Rate
price-alert:
Oops ! Dash price was not sent by CoinGecko.
Please retry later to get the right numbers on this page.
XKCD-functions: Percentages computed by XKCD’s functions that are based on current Dash parameters.
MN-collateral: Running a masternode requires a Đ 1000 collateral. The server running the masternode also involves some costs, usually minor.
MN-varying:
The % of yearly earnings may vary throughout one year, depending in particular on variations of the total number of active masternodes.
Whatever this % becomes, you WILL earn Dash as long as your masternode is running properly.
MN-1-year-simulation:
This is a ### earnings simulation assuming today’s Dash market price (≈ §§§) remains stable for one year.
Whatever the price becomes, you WILL earn something as long as your masternode is running properly.
Evo-collateral: Running an Evonode requires a Đ 4000 collateral. The server running the Evonode also involves some costs, usually minor.
Evo-varying:
The % of yearly earnings may vary throughout one year, depending in particular on variations of the total number of active Evonodes.
Whatever this % becomes, you WILL earn Dash as long as your Evonode is running properly.
Evo-1-year-simulation:
This is a ### earnings simulation assuming today’s Dash market price (≈ §§§) remains stable for one year.
Whatever the price becomes, you WILL earn something as long as your Evonode is running properly.
earnings-1-year-ago:
What would my earnings be today
if I had started a Masternode or Evonode one year ago ?
way-to-estimate: A way to estimate your Dash masternode & Evonode returns.
approx-MN-collateral-1-year-ago: This was the approximate ### price of a Đ 1000 masternode collateral one year ago (Dash price was ≈ §§§ on ≈ @@@).
MN-approx-APY:
If your masternode properly worked, it automatically received this approximate amount of Dash rewards for one year.
(The average masternode APY for the last 365 days was ≈ ###%.)
MN-approx-earnings-1-year: If you had started your masternode one year ago, its earnings over one year would be approximately worth this ### amount at today's Dash market price (≈ §§§).
1000-worth-today: Your Đ 1000 collateral, bought one year ago, would be approximately worth this ### amount at today's Dash market price (≈ §§§).
approx-Evo-collateral-1-year-ago: This was the approximate ### price of a Đ 4000 Evonode collateral one year ago (Dash price was ≈ §§§ on ≈ @@@).
Evo-approx-APY:
If your Evonode properly worked, it automatically received this approximate amount of Dash rewards for one year.
(The average Evonode APY for the last 365 days was ≈ ###%.)
Evo-approx-earnings-1-year: If you had started your Evonode one year ago, its earnings over one year would be approximately worth this ### amount at today's Dash market price (≈ §§§).
4000-worth-today: Your Đ 4000 collateral, bought one year ago, would be approximately worth this ### amount at today's Dash market price (≈ §§§).
